zh.lifeSummary: 當Mercy Dudley於1621年9月27日出生在英國時，她的父親Governor Thomas Dudley44歲，母親Dorothy Yorke38歲。她於1639年5月20日與Reverend John Woodbridge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可安多福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她於1630年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓。她去世於1691年7月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年69歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波雷波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mercy Dudley于1621年9月27日出生在英国时，她的父亲Governor Thomas Dudley44岁，母亲Dorothy Yorke38岁。她于1639年5月20日与Reverend John Woodbridge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可安多福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她于1630年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓。她去世于1691年7月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年69岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波雷波特。

nameMeanings.name: Dudley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from Dudley in Worcestershire, recorded as Duddeleye, Doddeleye in the 13th and 14th centuries, named from the Old English personal name Dudda (see Dodd 1) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish (southern Ireland): in Ireland, when not the English name, it was adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe ‘descendant of Dubhdáleithe’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + dá ‘two’ + léithe ‘sides’.

variants.name: Dowdall
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish John Patrick, Niall.
Irish (Dublin, Meath, and Louth): English surname adopted by bearers of Gaelic Ó Dubhdáleithe (see Dudley 2).

variants.name: Dagley
meanings: English: variant of Dadley, itself a variant of Dudley , with dissimilation of d-d to d-g.
Americanized form of German Dägele (see Dagle ) or Degele, from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names formed with Old High German diot ‘people, nation’.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

variants.name: Diddle
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Dudley  . Compare   Aduddell  .
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Dittel  .

nameMeanings.name: Mercy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the quality of magnanimity, and in particular God's forgiveness of sinners, a quality much prized in Christian tradition. The word is derived from Latin merces, which originally meant ‘wage’ or ‘reward’ ( see Mercedes ). The name was in regular use from the mid 15th century onwards and was favoured by the Puritans; Mercy is the companion of Christiana in the second part of John Bunyan's Pilgrim's Progress ( 1684 ). Subsequently, it fell out of use as a given name. In modern use, this is often an Anglicized form of Mercedes.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Mercy Dudley was born on 27 September 1621, in England, her father, Governor Thomas Dudley, was 44 and her mother, Dorothy Yorke, was 38. She married Reverend John Woodbridge on 20 May 1639, in Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She lived in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1630. She died on 1 July 1691, in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 69, and was buried in Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mercy Dudley est née le 27 septembre 1621, à Angleterre, son père, Governor Thomas Dudley, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Yorke, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Reverend John Woodbridge le 20 mai 1639, à Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle a vécu à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1630. Elle est décédée le 1 juillet 1691, à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mercy Dudley am 27. September 1621 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Governor Thomas Dudley 44 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Yorke 38. Sie hat am 20. Mai 1639 in Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Reverend John Woodbridge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1630 hat sie in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Sie starb am 1. Juli 1691 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mercy Dudley è nata il il 27 settembre 1621 nel England, sua padre, Governor Thomas Dudley, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Dorothy Yorke, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Reverend John Woodbridge il 20 maggio 1639, nel Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Vissuto a Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1630. Morì il 1 luglio 1691, nel Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mercy Dudleyが1621年9月27日にイギリスで生まれた時，父Governor Thomas Dudleyは44歳，母Dorothy Yorkeは38歳であった。1639年5月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスアンドバーでReverend John Woodbridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1630年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンに住んでいた。彼女は1691年7月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリーで69歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリプオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mercy Dudley(이)가 1621년 9월 27일 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Governor Thomas Dudley(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Yorke(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1639년 5월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 앤도버에서 Reverend John Woodbridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1630년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 살았다. 그녀는 1691년 7월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이포트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mercy Dudley родилась 27 сентября 1621 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Governor Thomas Dudley было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Yorke, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reverend John Woodbridge 20 мая 1639 г. в местности андовир, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она жила в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1630 году. Она умерла 1 июля 1691 г. в местности нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности нюбурипорт, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mercy Dudley nació el 27 de septiembre de 1621, en Inglaterra, su papá, Governor Thomas Dudley, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Dorothy Yorke, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Reverend John Woodbridge el 20 de mayo de 1639, en Andover, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Vivió en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1630. Murió el 1 de julio de 1691, en Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
